feed.title: Rama Krishna Kandukuri
feed.subtitle: Website for my projects, research, publications and thoughts.

entry.title: updates
entry.content:
• Joined Polybot as robot software engineer.
  • Our paper, Physics-Based Rigid Body Object Tracking and Friction Filtering From RGB-D Videos accepted in 3DV 2024. Check here.
entry.summary: Joined Polybot as robot software engineer. Our paper, Physics-Based Rigid Body Object Tracking and Friction Filtering From RGB-D Videos accepted in 3DV 2024. Check here.
